description:
Advances: specled.realized_by

Deliverable:
End-to-end integration tests for the five scenarios in the spec. Use test/test_support/state_json_fixture.ex (S0) to control state.json contents across scenario runs. Each scenario has cardinality + tier-set assertions.

Scenarios:
1. Hard-coupled MFA, drift fires on both tiers (specled.realized_by.scenario.implication_drift_both_tiers).
2. Existing duplication validator-warns and is cleanable (specled.realized_by.scenario.existing_duplication_validator_warns) — exercises validator alongside dedup task; coordinate with S7+S8.
3. Bare-module first-run silent seed, then drift on change (specled.realized_by.scenario.bare_module_first_run_silent_seed + bare_module_drift_after_seed).
4. Adding public export to bare-module-tracked module fires drift on both tiers (specled.realized_by.scenario.bare_module_export_added).
5. Dangling MFA reports once tier=implementation (specled.realized_by.scenario.dangling_implication_once).

Plus: bare-module not-loadable dangles (specled.realized_by.scenario.bare_module_not_loadable_dangles); inferred flag does not leak (specled.realized_by.scenario.inferred_flag_does_not_leak).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: new integration test file (test/specled_ex/realization/implication_integration_test.exs or similar) green for all five scenarios + the two extras.
- Behaviors to demonstrate: each scenario's specled.realized_by.scenario.* id resolves and the test asserts the spec's then-clause.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/** (no production code changes — scenarios test what S1-S5 already shipped)
- .spec/** (specs are advanced by S9, not here)
Allowed touches:
- test/specled_ex/realization/implication_integration_test.exs (new) OR appended scenarios in existing integration files
- test/specled_ex/realization/orchestrator_test.exs (only if a scenario is more naturally a unit-orchestrator test)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do NOT add new production code in this stage.
- Do NOT modify the validator (S7) or dedup task (S8); scenario 2 only depends on them being landed first.
- Use StateJsonFixture (S0) for state.json control. Never run integration scenarios against the real .spec/state.json.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] Spec verification passes
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S6: Integration scenarios 1-5
